registrationWelcome:
📝 *Registration Process Started!*

I'm here to help you get started. Let's begin your registration process.

✍️ *Step 1 of 3*
What name would you like me to call you?
registrationStep2:
✅ Nice to meet you, *{{name}}*!

🔐 *Step 2 of 3*
Please enter your registration password to complete the setup.
registrationStep3:
🌍 *Step 3 of 3 - Timezone Selection*

To show you event times correctly, please choose your timezone:

*1* - Montreal (Eastern Time)
*2* - Los Angeles (Pacific Time)
*3* - Other (UTC)

Type the number of your choice, or type *cancel* to stop registration.
registrationSuccess:
🎉 *Registration Complete!*

Welcome aboard, *{{name}}*!
You're now registered as a *{{role}}* user.
Your timezone is set to *{{timezone}}*.

Type *help* to explore what you can do!
registrationWrongPassword:
❌ *Incorrect Password*

The password you entered is not valid. Please try again, or type *cancel* to stop the registration process.
registrationInvalidTimezone:
❌ *Invalid Timezone Choice*

Please enter *1* for Montreal, *2* for Los Angeles, or *3* for Other/UTC.

Or type *cancel* to stop registration.
registrationFailed:
⚠️ *Registration Failed*

Sorry, I couldn't save your registration due to a technical issue. Please try again later or contact support.
registrationCanceled:
❌ *Registration Canceled*

No worries! You can start the registration process anytime by typing *register*.
statusUnregistered:
📊 *Your Status*

❌ You are not currently registered.

Type *register* to get started!
statusUserNotFound:
❌ *User Not Found*

No user found with the name "{{username}}".

Use *list users* to see all registered users.
unregisterConfirmSelf:
⚠️ *Confirm Account Deletion*

Are you sure you want to permanently delete your account? This action cannot be undone and will remove all your data.

Reply *yes* to confirm or *no* to cancel.
unregisterConfirmOther:
⚠️ *Confirm User Deletion*

Are you sure you want to permanently delete {{username}}'s account? This action cannot be undone.

Reply *yes* to confirm or *no* to cancel.
unregisterSuccessSelf:
✅ *Account Deleted Successfully*

Your account has been completely removed from our system.

Send *register* anytime to create a new account!
unregisterSuccessOther:
✅ *User Deleted Successfully*

{{username}}'s account has been completely removed from the system.
unregisterCanceled:
❌ *Deletion Canceled*

No worries! The account remains active.

Type *help* to see available commands.
unregisterInvalidResponse:
❓ *Please Confirm*

Please reply with *yes* to confirm or *no* to cancel.
unregisterUserNotFound:
❌ *User Not Found*

No user found with the name "{{username}}".

Use *list users* to see all registered users.
unregisterCannotDeleteAdmin:
❌ *Cannot Delete Admin*

You cannot delete another admin account for security reasons.

Use *unregister* to delete your own account.
listUsersNoUsers:
📋 *User List*

No users are currently registered in the system.
timezonePrompt:
🌍 *Change Your Timezone*

Your current timezone is: *{{currentTimezone}}*

Please choose your new timezone:

*1* - Montreal (Eastern Time)
*2* - Los Angeles (Pacific Time)
*3* - Other (UTC)

Type the number of your choice, or type *cancel* to keep your current setting.
timezoneSuccess:
✅ *Timezone Updated!*

Your timezone has been changed from *{{oldTimezone}}* to *{{timezone}}*.

All event times will now be displayed in your new timezone.
timezoneUnchanged:
ℹ️ *No Change*

You've selected *{{timezone}}*, which is already your current timezone setting.

No changes were made.
timezoneInvalid:
❌ *Invalid Choice*

Please enter *1* for Montreal, *2* for Los Angeles, or *3* for Other/UTC.

Or type *cancel* to keep your current timezone.
timezoneFailed:
⚠️ *Update Failed*

Sorry, I couldn't update your timezone due to a technical issue. Please try again later.
timezoneCanceled:
❌ *Timezone Change Canceled*

Your timezone setting remains unchanged.
